text.title: API Authentication Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-authentication artefact.

step.name: identify-audience
step.action: Tag each caller as b2c-browser / b2c-mobile / b2b-partner / server-to-server / iot.

step.name: size-lifetimes
step.action: Pick access_token_ttl_seconds within cap; set refresh_token_rotates per scheme.
step.decision-gate: ttl > 3600 with high SLA → fail token-lifetime-cap.

step.name: define-revocation
step.action: Write a concrete revocation path (introspection endpoint / session delete / key rotate procedure).

step.name: publish-spec
step.action: Emit AUTH-* artefact; cross-link to api-rate-limiting (token key) and api-error-handling (401/403 envelope).
